meta.title: Diana Furchtgott-Roth on C-SPAN's Washington Journal
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Employment Policy Diana Furchtgott-Roth was a guest of C-SPAN's Washington Journal on January 24, 2011. She discussed job creation and regulations.
